open_tensions.question: What minimal asymmetry, if any, could allow unmarked continuation to register its own persistence without reintroducing forbidden trace?
What minimal self-referential operation would allow negation to register contingency as its own preconditionless evidence, without any detectable residue or asymmetry?
What minimal re-entrant marker, if any, could register contingency within preconditionless negation without reintroducing detectable asymmetry or trace?
What condition, if any, allows the unregistered horizon to register its own non-registration without immediately indexing itself out of existence?
What condition, if any, allows the noticing of pure non-registration to remain distinguishable from the total absence of noticing?
What minimal asymmetry would allow the unregistered horizon to register its own refusal without that registration immediately indexing itself out of existence?
